title: pentacalia involuta
intro: Pentacalia involuta is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the involuted pentacalia. It is native to Ecuador, and its leaves and stems have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The medicinal properties of Pentacalia involuta include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin infections, and digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Pentacalia involuta can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues.
